sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n86344" key="prhsthroso/xos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πρηστηροσόχος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n86344.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">receiving thunderbolts,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κόλποι</foreign> Orac.Chald. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg009:p.58" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Cra.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.58</biblScope> </bibl> P.</sense> </entryFree>
